---
title : "Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy"
date : "2026-01-01"
author : "Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas"
categories : ["Presentation"]
publication : " In\_Equality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz "
publication_short : " In\_Equality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz "
abstract : "(Abstract not available)"
abstract_short : ""
about:
  template: marquee
  links:
    - icon: NA
      href: NA
---


::: {.callout-note title="How to cite this work"}

Castillo, Juan Carlos; Canales, Rene; Laffert, Andreas & Urzua, Tomas (2026). *Justification Trajectories for Pension Inequality in Chile (2016-2023): The Role of Social Class and Beliefs in Meritocracy*.  In\_Equality Conference. Panel 17: Meritocracy and Inequality Beliefs. Universitat Konstanz 

:::
